name: M.K. Real Estate Development Public Company Limited
summary: M.K. Real Estate Development Public Company Limited engages in the property development business in Thailand. The company operates through five segments: Real Estate; Rental Warehouse, Factory and Others; Golf Services; Property Management; and Health and Wellness Center. It develops and sells land, houses, and condominiums; and provides property management services. The company is also involved in building and parking rental activities, as well as in the golf course business. In addition, it operates health and wellness centers. The company was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
